kirundi.handwaver_inspired_build_by_stretching: Vyatewe inkunga na HandWaver: ubaka unyuze mu kurambura akadomo → umurongo → urwego → ikintu gikomeye
kirundi.sculpt_mode_title: Kubaji AI: sigura ikintu, AI igihimba ikoresheje imiterere y'ibanze — hanyuma ukinonosore
kirundi.enter_vr_title: Injira muri VR — hagarara iruhande rw'icitegererezo cawe (bisaba agakoresho k'umutwe)
kirundi.click_ai_tutor_or_press_to_get_insight: Fyonda "Umwigisha AI" canke ufyonde / kugira ngo ubone ubushishozi ku miterere iriho.
kirundi.ai_sculpt_help: Sigura ikintu — AI ikigena ikoresheje imiterere y'ibanze (agasanduku, umupira, silindre, inkoni, uruziga). Hanyuma ukinonosore n'intoki canke ubaza.
kirundi.build_geometry_by_stretching_a_point_i: Ubaka jeyometri unyuze mu kurambura akadomo kuba umurongo, umurongo kuba urwego, n'urwego kuba ikintu gikomeye. Buri kurambura kongeraho ikintu gishasha ku gice.
kirundi.mostly_points_stretch_any_to_begin_bui: Ahanini utudomo — rambura ako ari ko kose kugira ngo utangure kubaka uduce tw'umurongo.
kirundi.rectangles_dominate_stretch_perpendicu: Kare nivyo bikomeye. Rambura mu buryo buhagaze ku rwego kugira ngo usohore prism.
kirundi.predict_geometry_properties_as_you_str: Hanura ibiranga jeyometri mu gihe urambura. Nta rupfunguzo rw'ibisubizo — wowe ushiraho urumenyo rwawe.
kirundi.your_hypothesis_what_stretches_grow_le: Iciyumviro cawe (ni ukurambura kuhe gukura uburebure vuba — ubuso vuba — ingano vuba?)
kirundi.when_you_stretch_a_segment_perpendicul: Iyo urambuye igice mu buryo buhagaze kuri co ubwaco, ni iki kibaho ku mubare w'ingero zaco?
kirundi.if_centroid_shifts_after_a_stretch_wha: Nimba hagati yimuka nyuma yo kurambura, werekeje he kurambura cane?
kirundi.what_would_make_this_construction_symm: Ni iki catuma iri yubakwa riresha kuruhande rwa hagati yaryo?
kirundi.i_can_explain_why_these_metrics_scale_: Nshobora gusigura impamvu izi ngero zigereranya gutya mu gihe ndambura.
kirundi.alloflow_requires_hardware_acceleratio: AlloFlow isaba ihutisha rya hardware kugira ngo yerekane amashusho 3D. Nyamuneka shiraho WebGL mu igenamiterere ya murondera yawe kugira ngo ukorane n'iri shuri.
kirundi.drag_rotate_scroll_zoom_right_click_pa: 🖱️ Kurura: zenguruka • Manura: rambura • Fyonda-iburyo: imura
kirundi.tip_your_answer_must_be_within_5_of_th: 💡 Impanuro: Igisubizo cawe kigomba kuba mu 5% vy'agaciro nyako. Koresha π ≈ 3.14159
